testsuite.name: Storage Layer Integration

testcase.name: should track operations and cleanup correctly
should fail recovery when too many shards are lost
should perform full async ingest and retrieve cycle with progress
should recover from partial shard loss using erasure coding

testsuite.system-out: On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: b68471b6462ed49bdb6c5faa673ed76881ab42e569e909ab0a5c5de6a114ed2f On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: bbe41f809ce9e8c4db3e181c6678bf0ab402bc72e5f6c0b9dcd80ae048c8614e
